requirement_topic.en: EMC - IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters

summary.en: PV inverters supplied into Israel should be documented with EMC evidence aligned to the current Israeli Standard or IEC references required by SII, the project owner, and the connection reviewer. The common international package for PV power conversion equipment is IEC 62920 for EMC requirements and test methods, with relevant IEC 61000-series immunity, emission, harmonic, and flicker tests depending on equipment rating and installation context. Because SII mandatory standards often adopt or reference IEC standards, exporters should confirm whether the current Israeli Standard route requires SII testing, recognition of foreign reports, or supplementary local documentation.
summary.zh: 供应至以色列的光伏逆变器应准备符合SII、项目业主和接入审查方所要求的现行以色列标准或IEC引用的EMC证据。光伏功率变换设备常见国际文件包为IEC 62920 EMC要求和测试方法，并根据设备额定值及安装场景提供相关IEC 61000系列抗扰度、发射、谐波和闪烁测试。由于SII强制标准常采纳或引用IEC标准，出口商应确认现行以色列标准路径是否要求SII测试、承认境外报告或补充本地文件。
summary.zht: 供應至以色列的光伏逆變器應準備符合SII、項目業主和接入審查方所要求的現行以色列標準或IEC引用的EMC證據。光伏功率轉換設備常見國際文件包為IEC 62920 EMC要求和測試方法，並根據設備額定值及安裝場景提供相關IEC 61000系列抗擾度、發射、諧波和閃爍測試。由於SII強制標準常採納或引用IEC標準，出口商應確認現行以色列標準路徑是否要求SII測試、承認境外報告或補充本地文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 - Photovoltaic power generating systems - EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series - Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic current emission and flicker where applicable
Current Israeli Standard / SII mandatory-standard route for the relevant inverter type - confirm before import

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and related China domestic EMC references. These reports may be useful for engineering comparison, but they are not proof that the inverter has passed IEC 62920, the relevant IEC 61000 limits, or an SII-recognized Israeli Standard route. If Chinese reports were run at China default voltage or firmware settings, the results may also fail to reflect Israel project configuration.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及相关中国国内EMC引用形成。这些报告可用于工程比较，但不能证明逆变器已通过IEC 62920、相关IEC 61000限值或SII认可的以色列标准路径。如中国报告是在中国默认电压或固件设置下完成，其结果也可能无法反映以色列项目配置。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及相關中國國內EMC引用形成。這些報告可用於工程比較，但不能證明逆變器已通過IEC 62920、相關IEC 61000限值或SII認可的以色列標準路徑。如中國報告是在中國預設電壓或韌體設置下完成，其結果也可能無法反映以色列項目配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China domestic EMC files should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, rating, firmware family, and grid configuration. Before import or tender submission, confirm with SII or the importer whether the reports must be issued by a specific accredited laboratory, whether report recognition is available, and whether Hebrew labeling or importer declaration documents are required.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内EMC文件应补充特定逆变器型号、额定值、固件系列和电网配置对应的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告。进口或投标提交前，应向SII或进口商确认报告是否必须由特定认可实验室出具、是否可承认境外报告，以及是否需要希伯来语标签或进口商声明文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內EMC文件應補充特定逆變器型號、額定值、韌體系列和電網配置對應的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告。進口或投標提交前，應向SII或進口商確認報告是否必須由特定認可實驗室出具、是否可承認境外報告，以及是否需要希伯來語標籤或進口商聲明文件。

mandatory_status.target: Potentially mandatory where EMC evidence is part of the applicable Israeli Standard, SII import release, tender specification, or grid-connection review; confirm current SII route for the product scope
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic EMC evidence supports China-side certification or tender review but does not by itself establish Israel/SII compliance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports as Israel/SII evidence. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter configuration, then confirm with SII or the Israel importer whether the reports are acceptable for the current mandatory-standard or import-release route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应依赖GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC报告作为以色列/SII证据。应针对准确逆变器配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告，然后与SII或以色列进口商确认这些报告是否可用于现行强制标准或进口放行路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應依賴GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC報告作為以色列/SII證據。應針對準確逆變器配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告，然後與SII或以色列進口商確認這些報告是否可用於現行強制標準或進口放行路徑。
